L.62$+`&2.3:1"1+.
Dedication. This work is dedicated to my wife, Ashley
Dawn, and to our kids — Jesse, Ayden, and Kylee —
who keep my world anchored while I go chasing
strange geometries at the edge of what we can
currently prove. Whatever shape these informational
bubbles finally take, the point of all of it is simple: to
leave you a universe that is a little more
understandable, a little more peaceful, and a little
more honest than the one I started in.
